prompt: generate a microservices architecture diagram with API gateways, container orchestration, message queues, and database connections with real-time monitoring indicators
prompt_refined: Generate a microservices architecture diagram. Clearly depict API Gateways, Container Orchestration components (e.g., Kubernetes clusters), Message Queues, and Database Connections. Integrate real-time monitoring indicators visually, such as small performance graphs, colored status lights (green, yellow, red), or alert symbols, associated with the relevant system components.
